title: Birthday Week
content: The Cloudflare Blog Subscribe to receive notifications of new posts: Birthday Week 15 years of helping build a better Internet: a look back at Birthday Week 2025 Rust-powered core systems, post-quantum upgrades, developer access for students, PlanetScale integration, open-source partnerships, and our biggest internship program ever — 1,111 interns in 2026 Nikita Cano Korinne Alpers Cloudflare just got faster and more secure, powered by Rust We’ve replaced the original core system in Cloudflare with a new modular Rust-based proxy, replacing NGINX Richard Boulton Steve Goldsmith Maurizio Abba Matthew Bullock Introducing Observatory and Smart Shield — see how the world sees your website, and make it faster in one click We're announcing two enhancements to our Application Performance suite that'll show how the world sees your website, and make it faster with one click - available Cloudflare Dashboard Brian Batraski Noah Maxwell Kennedy Monitoring AS-SETs and why they matter We will cover some of the reasons why operators need to monitor the AS-SET memberships for their ASN, and now Cloudflare Radar can help Mingwei Zhang Bryton Herdes An AI Index for all our customers Cloudflare will soon automatically create an AI-optimized search index for your domain, and expose a set of ready-to-use standard APIs and tools including an MCP server, LLMs.txt, and a search API Celso Martinho September 26, 2025 1:00 PM Introducing new regional Internet traffic and Certificate Transparency insights on Cloudflare Radar Cloudflare Radar now offers a Certificate Transparency dashboard for monitoring TLS certificate activity, and new regional traffic insights for a sub-national perspective on Internet trends David Belson , André Jesus , Luke Valenta September 26, 2025 1:00 PM Code Mode: the better way to use MCP It turns out we've all been using MCP wrong Kenton Varda , Sunil Pai September 26, 2025 1:00 PM Eliminating Cold Starts 2: shard and conquer We reduced Cloudflare Workers cold starts by 10x by optimistically routing to servers with already-loaded Workers Learn how we did it here Harris Hancock September 26, 2025 1:00 PM Network performance update: Birthday Week 2025 On the Internet, being fast is what matters and at Cloudflare, we are committed to being the fastest network in the world Lai Yi Ohlsen September 26, 2025 6:00 AM How Cloudflare uses the world’s greatest collection of performance data to make the world’s fastest global network even faster Cloudflare is using its vast traffic to send responses faster than ever before, by learning the characteristics of each individual network and tuning our congestion control system Steve Goldsmith , Richard Boulton September 25, 2025 2:05 PM Every Cloudflare feature, available to everyone Cloudflare is making every feature available to any customer Dane Knecht September 25, 2025 2:00 PM Cloudflare's developer platform keeps getting better, faster, and more powerful Here's everything that's new Cloudflare's developer platform keeps getting better, faster, and more powerful Here's everything that's new Brendan Irvine-Broque , Rita Kozlov , Korinne Alpers September 25, 2025 2:00 PM Partnering to make full-stack fast: deploy PlanetScale databases directly from Workers We’ve teamed up with PlanetScale to make shipping full-stack applications on Cloudflare Workers even easier Matt Silverlock , Thomas Gauvin , Adrian Gracia September 25, 2025 2:00 PM R2 SQL: a deep dive into our new distributed query engine R2 SQL provides a built-in, serverless way to run ad-hoc analytic queries against your R2 Data Catalog This post dives deep under the Iceberg into how we built this distributed engine Yevgen Safronov , Nikita Lapkov , Jérôme Schneider September 25, 2025 2:00 PM Safe in the sandbox: security hardening for Cloudflare Workers We are further hardening Cloudflare Workers with the latest software and hardware features We use defense-in-depth, including V8 sandboxes and the CPU's memory protection keys to keep your data safe , Ketan Gupta September 25, 2025 2:00 PM Announcing the Cloudflare Data Platform: ingest, store, and query your data directly on Cloudflare The Cloudflare Data Platform, launching today, is a fully-managed suite of products for ingesting, transforming, storing, and querying analytical data, built on Apache Iceberg and R2 storage Micah Wylde , Alex Graham , Jérôme Schneider September 25, 2025 2:00 PM Choice: the path to AI sovereignty Championing AI sovereignty through choice: diverse tools, data control, and no vendor lock-in We're enabling this in India, Japan, and Southeast Asia, offering local, open-source models on Workers AI Carly Ramsey , Smrithi Ramesh , Michelle Chen September 25, 2025 2:00 PM Announcing Cloudflare Email Service’s private beta Today, we’re launching Cloudflare Email Service Send and receive email directly from your Workers with native bindings—no API keys needed Sign up for the private beta Thomas Gauvin , Celso Martinho September 25, 2025 1:00 PM A year of improving Node.js compatibility in Cloudflare Workers Over the year we have greatly expanded Node.js compatibility There are hundreds of new Node.js APIs now available that make it easier to run existing Node.js code on our platform James M Snell September 24, 2025 2:00 PM A simpler path to a safer Internet: an update to our CSAM scanning tool Cloudflare has made it even easier to enable our free child safety tooling for all customers Rachael Truong Getting Started For enterprises Compare
